Estimates random dot product graphs from Aggregrated Relation Data.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`complement()`](https://alexpghayes.github.io/spectralard/reference/complement.md)
  : Generate data with specified correlation to a vector
- [`estimate_spectrum()`](https://alexpghayes.github.io/spectralard/reference/estimate_spectrum.md)
  : Estimate a low-rank network model from Aggregated Relational Data
  (ARD)
- [`simulate_ard_data()`](https://alexpghayes.github.io/spectralard/reference/simulate_ard_data.md)
  : Simulate Aggregated Relational Data (ARD)

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Linear-in-Means Estimation with 2SLS and
  ARD](https://alexpghayes.github.io/spectralard/articles/two-stage-least-squares.md):
